div.head: The Iranian Minister (Schayesteh) to the Secretary of State
div.p: The Minister of Iran presents his compliments to His Excellency the Secretary of State and has the honor to inform him that the Iranian Government intends to engage a high ranking American officer to take charge of the entire finance and army supply divisions of the Iranian War Department. This office is called “Intendant General,” which, I believe, corresponds in the United States to General Service of Supply.
The Minister would appreciate it very much if the Secretary of State would consent to give him the name of a suitable officer to be engaged by the Iranian Government.
